tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: I'm barely sweating on this; since nothing else is urgent, I'll just power through the last ten percent and grab a quick meal with my friends before it's due.
I just crushed the last 10% and submitted right before the deadline. Now that it's done, I can finally ditch my laptop to grab lunch with the cohort without any guilt.

desires: Ditch the laptop immediately to eat with my cohort and feel like a 'real' person again
Never have to sit alone in this room finishing something boring again
Make sure I don't look like a slacker when I'm done, even if I barely moved

goals.description: Hit submit on the assignment RIGHT NOW to lock in the win and stop feeling like a slacker, then immediately ditch this laptop.
goals.rationale: I just got 90% done; dragging it out one more minute feels like wasting time I could be eating with cohort_3. My affiliation value screams that I need to join them now, not sit here alone looking guilty. The deadline is in 10 minutes, so why wait? Just hit send and get out.

agent.last_reasoning: Goal g1 demands immediate disconnection to join cohort_3 for a meal (affiliation priority 0.5). I just submitted the work; lingering here feels like wasting time with them. Messaging first ensures they know I'm coming over without guilt.

goals.description: Finish the assignment and hit submit by 13:15 so I can be done before Prof. Assignment asks for an extension.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value is maxed out; I cannot tolerate the stress of disappointing my friends or having to awkwardly explain to my professor why I'm late again. The short planning horizon means I only care about this immediate window, not tomorrow's sleep debt.

goals.description: Grab a meal with cohort_3 immediately after submitting.
goals.rationale: Relationships are worth 50% of my value system. Once the guilt of skipping lunch is removed by finishing the work, eating with them is non-negotiable. I'll defer the actual act until submission is confirmed, but it's the primary driver right now.

goals.description: Drop the note tidying task entirely.
goals.rationale: My risk tolerance is high and procrastination bias is at 7/10. That Friday deadline feels like it doesn't exist yet. No point wasting energy on soft tasks when I'm in a rush to protect my social time.

desires: Finish this assignment in the next 30 minutes so I can grab a proper meal with my friends without feeling guilty about skipping it.
Get this submitted before 1:30 PM so I don't have to explain to Prof. Assignment why I'm late or ask for an extension again.
Stay up just enough longer tonight to make sure I didn't miss anything, even though I know I'll be exhausted tomorrow.
